rationale: No direct conflict. The comptroller's duties to estimate, report, and certify available school fund amounts remain unchanged, but estimation methodology must account for reduced local revenue from the larger homestead exemption.
quote: the comptroller shall estimate the amount of the available school fund receivable from every source during the following school year
_note: Section 43.014 imposes procedural duties on the comptroller; the proposed exemption increase affects underlying revenue figures but not the duties themselves. Comptroller rulemaking may be needed to update estimation models.
